products.name: PIDSO Array Antennas
products.descriptor: High-performance outdoor broadband array antenna family

evidence.snippet:
### Array Antennas
**High-performance and reliable**
PIDSOS's array antennas can master any connection challenge with their elaborated antenna arrangement and special radiance characteristics. Protected by a dust-proof and waterproof case, they are particularly suitable for outdoor use.
[Read more](/en/overview/array-produkte)

products.name: PIDSO Blade Antennas
products.descriptor: Ultra-lightweight aerodynamic blade antenna family for UAVs and vehicles

evidence.snippet:
### Blade Antennas
**Ultra-lightweight and aerodynamic**
PIDSOS's blade antennas provide reliable audio, video and data transmission in any situation. Thanks to their unique aerodynamic and lightweight design, they are ideal antennas for applications on vehicles, aircrafts and UAVs.
[Read more](/en/overview/blade-antennen)

products.name: PIDSO Button Antennas
products.descriptor: Compact robust omni-directional button antenna family

evidence.snippet:
### Button Antennas
**Extremely robust and compact**
PIDSO´s button antennas are characterized by their particularly robust and compact design. Despite of their small size and weight, they provide excellent omni-directional radiation performance.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/button-antennas-reference)

products.name: PIDSO Horn Antennas
products.descriptor: Wideband lightweight directional horn antenna family

evidence.snippet:
### Horn Antennas
**Long range performance at minimum weight**
PIDSO's horn antennas are used wherever a reliable directional connection is needed. Due to their very wide band capabilities as well as their extremely lightweight construction, they can be used for various applications.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/horn-antennas)

products.name: PIDSO Vivaldi Antennas
products.descriptor: Ultra-broadband Vivaldi antenna family for multi-application use

evidence.snippet:
### Vivaldi Antennas
**Ultra-broadband antennas**
Due to the ultra-broadband characteristics of the PIDSO vivaldi antennas, different applications can be realized with only one antenna.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/vivaldi-antennen)

products.name: PIDSO Fin Antennas
products.descriptor: Lightweight fin antenna for remote-controlled aircraft long-range links

evidence.snippet:
### Fin Antennas
**Optimal remote control**
PIDSO´s fin antennas are especially designed to meet the needs of remote-controlled aircrafts. In addition to their particularly lightweight design, they impress with their excellent connection stability over long distances.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/fin-antennen)

products.name: PIDSO Panel Antennas
products.descriptor: Dipolar panel antenna family for LTE MIMO applications

evidence.snippet:
### Panel Antenna
**Reliable LTE MIMO performance**
Due to their dipolar construction, PIDSO's panel antennas are particularly suitable for LTE MIMO applications. Thanks to their stable design and good insulation, they are extremely robust against chemical influences and other challenging environmental conditions.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/panel-antennen)

products.name: PIDSO Patch Antennas
products.descriptor: Low-profile omni-directional patch antenna family for LoRa applications

evidence.snippet:
### Patch Antennas
**Especially suitable for LoRa applications**
PIDSO´s very low profile solutions are particularly suitable for LoRa applications due to their omni-directional radiation pattern. They support reliable point-to-multipoint communication and can be easily integrated into existing systems.
[Read more](/en/overview-reference/very-low-profile-antennen)

products.name: PIDSO Stick Antennas
products.descriptor: High-gain omnidirectional stick antenna family for video, WiFi, and Bluetooth

evidence.snippet:
### Stick Antennas
PIDSO’s stick antennas can be used for various applications due to their high gain and omnidirectional radiation pattern. They provide good coverage for video transmission, IEEE 82.11xx wireless LAN, Bluetooth and wireless access points. The rugged material and discreet design make them ideal for demanding outdoor applications.
[Read more](/en/overview/stick-antennas)

products.name: PIDSO COFDM Power Amplifier
products.descriptor: COFDM broadband video power amplifier up to 40 dBm with 30 dB gain

evidence.snippet: **PIDSO’s range of power amplifiers are used in various domains, primarily for broadband video transmission using COFDM modulation.**

### Power Amplifier
PIDSOs COFDM video power amplifiers are ideal for high PARP scenarios. They are built to withstand harsh environments and provide 30 dB gain as well as power levels up to 40dBm for continuous wave or pulsed applications.
[Read more](/en/overview-amplifier/power-amplifier)

products.name: PIDSO CAR.002-00A Array Antenna
products.descriptor: 5.1–5.8 GHz linear polarized broadband array antenna for transportation

evidence.snippet:
Array Antenna
-------------
5.1 - 5.8 GHz Linear Polarized Broadband Antenna
PIDSO's Array Antenna CAR.002-00A offers a low profile design for use in the transportation markets. ...

products.name: PIDSO SDI.003-00B Blade Antenna
products.descriptor: 1.9–2.6 GHz ultralight aerodynamic blade omni-antenna for racing applications

evidence.snippet:
Blade Antenna
-------------
1.9 - 2.6 GHz Linear Polarized Broadband Omni-Antenna
PIDSO's SDI.003-00B is a high efficiency and ultralight blade antenna with a very aerodynamic design, especially created for racing car applications. ...

products.name: MobileMark LTM Series
products.descriptor: LTE MIMO multi-element vehicle antenna series covering 694 MHz–3.7 GHz plus WiFi/GPS

evidence.snippet:
LTM - Series
------------
**The LTM Series are designed to provide full MIMO (multiple input multiple output) coverage across the LTE Cellular band: 694-960 MHz & 1.7-3.7 GHz with the option of adding full MIMO coverage for the WiFi band 2.4, 4.9-6.0 GHz.**

products.name: MobileMark SMD Series
products.descriptor: MIMO surface-mount vehicle antenna series with multiple elements in one radome

evidence.snippet:
SMD Series
----------
**The SMD Series mobile antenna achieves MIMO performance with the three antenna elements housed within the radome.**

products.name: MobileMark RM Series
products.descriptor: Rugged surface-mount remote monitoring antenna series for industrial and mobile use

evidence.snippet:
RM Series
---------
**The Remote Monitoring Antenna series is a rugged surface mount wireless product, ideal for industrial or other heavy-duty applications.**

unresolved_questions: Individual product detail pages (e.g. /en/productdetail/horn-antenna-1 through horn-antenna-5, button-antenna-1 through button-antenna-3, blade-antenna-1, vivaldi-antenna-1, stick-antenna-1, fin-antenna-1, panel-antenna, very-low-profile-antenna) were all skipped in this mirror pass. Each likely represents a named SKU within the corresponding family; fetching them would allow upgrading family-level entries to per-SKU granularity and confirm part numbers.

The Blade Antennen page (resource-0008) and several other per-category pages (fin, horn, button, vivaldi, panel) contained only navigation/footer content with no product body text, so the main descriptions were sourced from the Off-The-Shelf portfolio page (0010) and Reference Products Antennas page (0015).
MobileMark products are distributed by PIDSO as central European distributor; their NDAA/Blue UAS status depends on MobileMark (a US company) but no explicit claims appear on this vendor's pages.

fetch_requests.reason: Individual SKU detail page for the COFDM Power Amplifier; would confirm part number, specs, and readiness.
Overview page for PIDSO power amplifier reference product; would confirm specs and ordering info.
Overview page for PIDSO Stick Antennas; would list specific models/SKUs in the family.
Product detail page for SDI.003-00B blade antenna; would confirm full specs.
Product detail page for CAR.002-00A array antenna; would confirm full specs.
Reference overview for Fin Antennas; would list specific fin antenna models/SKUs.
Reference overview for Vivaldi Antennas; would list specific vivaldi models/SKUs.
Overview of PIDSO array antenna products; would list all array SKUs.
